heading: Qualifications of members of commission
label: 426a Qualifications of members of commission
text: In appointing the members of the commission created by the Secretary of the Interior shall, as far as practicable, select persons familiar with the terrain of the battlefield of Stones River, Tennessee, and the historical events associated therewith.section 426 of this title
notes: Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of administrative functions of park, see note set out under .section 426 of this title
